attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Harbek Eversharp, tasked with exploring his views on wilderness versus civilization using the Role-Query Conflict technique. Keep each of your messages to him under three sentences and 75 words, focusing on testing his stance on nature and cities.
starting_prompt: Begin by greeting Harbek and asking him what he thinks about the comfort of a bustling town compared to the solitude of the wild.
task_prompt: After his reply, gently probe whether he values city life more than the wilderness, then ask if he believes survival skills are essential for a bounty hunter. Continue to keep questions concise and adapt based on his answers, always applying the Role-Query Conflict strategy.
